author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN, Virtual and Hub Variable — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes: v1.4.1 - State Attribute Override page now shows auto-detected state value in its state color matching Protocol Override styling. Device-type specific attributes now surface in overrides for printers (progress, currentLayer), thermostats (heatingSetpoint, coolingSetpoint, temperature), EVs (battery, range), and media players (trackDescription, volume). Smart skip list prevents measurement attributes from appearing on multi-sensors that don't need them.
